milestoneReveal_tagline: Our biggest update yet — packed with the features you asked for.
milestoneShowcase_closingBody:
Namaze umwaka wose nkora iyi nyandiko. Twizeye ko bizakugirira akamaro mu murimo wo kubwiriza.

Mu rukundo rwa kivandimwe,
milestoneHero_liquidGlass_description: Igishushanyo gishya hamwe na tab bar izunguruka, amakarita akonje, hamwe nibikoresho byihariye bifata umucyo. Amaherezo, iyo app iba iri mu rugo kuri telefoni yawe.
milestoneHero_progress_description: Isura nshya y'ukwezi, umwaka, n'ibihe byose, hamwe n'intambwe zisanzwe, gusenyuka kw'ibyiciro, amasaha y'ubuzima, na fireworks igihe urenze intego.
milestoneHero_contacts_description: A dedicated Contacts tab with fuzzy search, smart sort, stacked filters, and inline avatars. Find anyone in two taps.
milestoneHero_iCloudSync_description: Your reports, contacts, and plans sync seamlessly across all your devices through iCloud. Optional photo sync keeps avatars in step too. Supporter feature.
milestoneHero_widgets_description: Porogaramu ya USU-Soft ikora amasaha y'ukwezi, amasaha n'amahugurwa y'igihe gito kuri ecran yawe y'urugo. Kanda kuri widget iyo ari yo yose kugirango usimbuke neza aho ukeneye kujya.
milestoneSecondary_onboardingFounder_des: Onboarding yubatswe kuva hasi kugera hejuru, hamwe n'inyandiko yihariye y'umuterankunga hamwe n'urutonde rw'intego zawe.
milestoneSecondary_fireworks_description: Beautiful celebrations the moment you cross a milestone or annual goal.
milestoneSecondary_avatars_description: Ongeraho ifoto cyangwa avatar ya emoji kuri buri contact, ukoresheje gukanda kugirango kwagure umureba wuzuye.
milestoneSecondary_sharing_description: Hand off a contact to another publisher with a secure universal link.
milestoneSecondary_missedConversations_d: A gentle home-screen nudge for follow-ups that slipped past — dismiss them once you've reached out.
milestoneSecondary_followUpRework_descri: Urupapuro rusobanutse rwa reschedule hamwe na chips zihuse, inzira ngufi yo gusura log, hamwe na tappable contact previews.
milestoneSecondary_recurring_description: Gahunda y'umunsi w'icyumweru n'icyumweru cy'ukwezi, hamwe n'ibisobanuro n'ibiciro by'ibicuruzwa.
milestoneSecondary_rollover_description: Iminota mike ikomeza mu kwezi gutaha, intoki cyangwa mu buryo bwikora.
milestoneSecondary_supporter_description: A little thank-you for those already supporting the app — exclusive perks like a custom accent color.
milestoneSecondary_appIcon_description: Abashyigikiye barashobora guhinduranya icon ya porogaramu ya ecran yo mu rugo kuri imwe mu mpinduka nyinshi.
milestoneSecondary_schedule_description: A focused calendar view of your day plans and repeating conversations.
milestoneSecondary_shaders_description: Ubuzima bwawe bw'umurimo mu buryo bumwe: izina, inshingano, igihe cyakorewe, n'imibare ishimishije.
milestoneSecondary_mapEmpty_description: A friendlier empty state and refined location prompts on first use.

160.c1: Conversations are now editable. Notifications are configurable
160.c2: Swipe gestures to edit or delete conversations, contacts, etc.
160.c3: Added haptic feedback to various important actions

161.c1: Added more minute options for time entries

162.c1: Adjusted special pioneer hour requirement from 70 to 100

181.c2: Added store review request after certain criteria is met

182.c1: Updated all time to reflect the current locale

190.c2: [iOS] Select between Google, Apple, and Waze as your default navigation app in preferences.
190.c3: Ubu wagena igihe gisanzwe cyo gukurikirana n'imenyekanisha mu igenamiterere.
190.c5: New progress bar organizes your time entries by category
190.c6: Now add custom tags to your time entries
190.c7: Updated Time Reports screen to be better organized and separated by month

191.c1: Resolves an issue navigating to time screens.

192.c1: Ubu wa kanda ku kiganiro kugira ngo ugire ibyo uhindura, cyangwa ushobora gusunika ibumoso nka mbere.
192.c2: Fixes an issue where some devices have an overflowing progress bar.
192.c3: Adds more verbose handling of link errors for certain devices lacking required applications.
192.c4: Navigate directly to a month from the monthly routine section of the home screen.
192.c5: Time Reports screen better handles empty and future months.

1100.c1: Adds annual report to Time Reports screen! Keep track of your service year progress at a glance.
1100.c2: Adding time from Time Reports screen now defaults the report to the selected month.
1100.c3: Fixes an issue exporting January service report.

1110.c1: Hongewemo gukoreshwa na iPad na Tablet neza!
1110.c2: Hahinduwe imiterere imwe n'imwe kugira ngo ikore neza muri ekara nini.
1110.c3: Adjusted the method of submitting Bug Reports and Feature Requests to Github.

1111.c1: Hongewemo i paji yo gutanga impano kubifuza gutanga impano. Reba mu igenamiterere.

1120.c1: Hongewemo ubryo bwo kugarura no kubika amakuru bwite ya application. Ushobora kubika kuri Cloud, ukabigarura nyuma no mu bindi bikoresho bya elegitoroniki. Wabyohereza no ku zindi platform. Reba iyi miterere mishya mu igenamiterere.

1200.c1: Hongewemo ubryo bwo kugarura no kubika amakuru bwite ya application. Ushobora kubika kuri Cloud, ukabigarura nyuma no mu bindi bikoresho bya elegitoroniki. Wabyohereza no ku zindi platform. Reba iyi miterere mishya mu igenamiterere.

1201.c1: Huza n'igihe igice cya buri kwezi ahabanza kugira ngo ubone amezi abanza n'akurikira.
1201.c2: Hanonosowe ubuhinduzi bwo mu rurimi rwa Korean - Muvandimwe Paul, wakoze. Niba ushaka gufasha guhindura mu rurimi rwawe, reba mu igenamiterere.

1210.c4: Hanonosowe ubuziranenge kuri ekara y'ikarita harimo n'amakuru akenewe ndetse na buto yo kongeramo byihuse.

1211.c1: Hongewe izindi ngingo z'ingenzi inshuro imwe aho bikenewe.

1220.c3: Added Calendar to time reports screen.
1220.c1: Preferences are now better organized by category.
1220.c2: Improved import & export screen to be visually clearer.
1220.c4: Occasionally notifies you to create a new backup. This is configurable in the settings.

1221.c1: [iOS] Date and Time pickers now use the correct locale
1221.c2: Fixed an issue where editing a conversation would incorrectly navigate.
1221.c3: Other minor bug fixes and performance improvements.
1221.c4: Improved Spanish translation - thank you brother Cleen. If you'd like to help translate your own language, see 'Help Translate' in the settings.

1230.c1: Added new Annual Overview screen to view your service year progress by month.
1230.c2: Added 'Today' button to quickly navigate back to current month when viewing previous months or years.
1230.c3: Updated Special Pioneers to not have an annual goal by default.
1230.c4: Added 'Annual Goal' setting to publisher preferences. This allows you to override the default setting for your publisher type.
1230.c5: Greatly improved Italian translations, thank you brother Giuseppe!

1240.c1: Hashyizwemo uburyo bwo kwihindurira ahantu hashyizwemo kuri buri karita. Ukandaho ukagumishaho agatoki, ubundi ukajyana aho ushaka.
1240.c2: Added small map view to contact details screen and resolved errors for invalid coordinates.
1240.c3: Resolved an overflow visual issue that sometimes occurs on small screens when viewing map contact cards.

1250.c1: Big update! Added scheduling & plans! 🚀 You can now create one-time plans, recurring plans, and view your month's schedule.
1250.c2: Improved clarity by adding 'toast' notifications for notable app actions.
1250.c3: Updated various sections of time reports screen to have more information and easier navigation.
1250.c4: Resolved minor visual issues and other bugs.
1250.c5: Added font size offset setting to preferences. This allows you to adjust the font size of the app.

1260.c1: Fixed issue where scroll position would be lost on TimeReportsScreen. Resolved other issues related to time reports screen.
1260.c2: Amasaha ya LDC ntabarwa mu kurenza amasaha 55 mu kwezi uko ari ko kose ku ntego y'umwaka.
1260.c3: Gahunda zisubiramo zasibwa n'ibizaba vuba cyangwa ibizaba vuba byose mu gihe kiri imbere.
1260.c4: New custom fields for contacts! You can create any number of custom fields you wish.
1260.c5: You can now share your time directly with NW Publisher!

1270.c1: Added Timer! ⏱️ (Stopwatch). You can now start and stop a timer to track your time directly within the app.
1270.c2: Resolved crashing issue for some devices when navigating to the Contact Details screen.
1270.c4: Other minor bug fixes and improvements.

1280.c3: Update dependencies and add security updates.
1280.c2: Updated Portuguese translations, thank you brother Sérgio!
1280.c4: 📝 A little personal note: I have been very busy with congregation responsibilities and life recently. After my upcoming convention next week, things will return more back to normal. I will be working on many more updates in the coming weeks! Thank you for your patience and for choosing WitnessWork! ❤️

1290.c1: Added new schedule section to month summary screen which helps you keep track of your time pacing.
1290.c2: Kuri ekara y'ahabanza, hakozwe neza ikibazo cy'ibyiciro byakingirizaga ibindi kigakunda kuba kuri ekara ntoya.
1290.c3: You can now edit time entries! Tap on them!
1290.c4: Many improvements have been made to clarity of how to add, update, and delete various items across WitnessWork. Hints have been removed as they're no longer necessary.
1290.c5: I'm looking for 2 volunteers who have experience in Software QA to assist in testing releases before they reach the public. If you have interest in spending a few hours a month testing, your support would be greatly appreciated. Please contact me: levi@leviwilkerson.com. In the future and as expenses allows, a portion of donations will go to QA for their time.
1290.c6: Annual time overview screen now is compressed for better readability.

1291.c1: [ANDROID] Resolved crashes that occurred when editing time.

1300.c1: Add 'Annual Schedule' to Plan Schedule screen for those with an annual goal, allowing you to easily see if you have planned enough time for your entire service year.
1300.c2: Hides 'today' schedule view when the month is in the future because it's not applicable.
1300.c4: If a contact pin was dragged for a contact, navigation will now prioritize the manually adjusted pin over their address. Editing a contact's address will return the address to priority.
1300.c7: Contact pin colors on Contact Details Screen now matches the map screen.
1300.c9: Month and annual total calculations now properly limit your credit time to 55 hours per month. Standard time is not affected by this rule. If you exceed this time using credit, you'll have overage displayed on your month's details screen.
1300.c10: Added time credit support. Existing users will be able to update their old time entries automatically.
1300.c11: Resolved issue with add button overlapping compass on iOS.

1310.c1: Greatly improved performance when navigating to time related screens.
1310.c3: Resolve date localization issue that occurred in some regions.
1310.c4: Updated styles and locations of commonly used items. Month and Service Year reports can be easily accessed in the tab bar at the bottom of the screen.
1310.c5: Resolved style overflow issues that occurred on certain screen sizes for the map screen.
1310.c6: Now automatically prefills recently used addresses when creating multiple contacts on the same day.
1310.c7: You can now toggle visibility of the home screen sections. Visit Preferences > Home Screen.
1310.c8: The app now is named WitnessWork, formerly 'JW Time' due to legal reasons.
1310.c9: Languages now attempt to find your exact region, otherwise it falls back to any locale with your language. If nothing can be found, it defaults to English.
1310.c10: Bemba language added! We need your help to translate. Please visit Settings > Help Translate

1320.c1: Now create coordinate only contacts. If your territory is very rural or with bad mapping information, there is now no need to rely on an address.
1320.c2: Easily toggle between device, dark, and light mode color scheme. Visit Preferences > Appearance.
1320.c4: 'Add Time' screen now allows for increments of 1 minute.
1320.c5: Wongeyeho ururimi rwa Kinyarwanda, rwahinduwe byuzuye na Semana D. Urakoze cyane kubufasha bwawe!
1320.c6: Urashobora noneho guhitamo uburyo igihe cyawe cyerekanwa. Hitamo hagati ya cumi nka: 13.5 cyangwa uhitemo 13 Hrs 30 Mins. Sura Ibyifuzo & gt; Kugaragara.

1330.c1: Hongewemo gutoranya ururimi. Reba Ibyatoranijwe kugirango uhindure ururimi.
1330.c2: Ikibazo cyakemutse kuri gahunda y'umusi umwe ifite itariki ntarengwa.

1340.c1: Wongeyeho ibihembo bidasanzwe mugihe ugenzuye igihe cyawe cyangwa wongeyeho umwanya!
1340.c2: Urashobora noneho gushiraho agaciro ka cumi kumigambi yisaha kuri & apos; gakondo & apos; ubwoko bw'abamamaza.

1350.c1: Urashobora noneho gukoresha autocomplete kugirango ushakishe adresse! Gusa tangira wandika kugirango ubone ibyifuzo. Iyi ngingo irashoboka gusa nimpano zawe nyinshi. Urakoze ku nkunga yawe!
1350.c2: Ikibazo cyakemutse aho urupapuro rwumunsi rudafunga byikora mugihe wongeyeho umwanya kumunsi wukwezi.
1350.c3: Gukemura ikibazo cyuzuye hejuru murugo murugo rwa tableti.

1360.c1: New: Share Contacts and easily import them. Transfering calls is now easier than ever.
1360.c2: Added a color key to the map view! You can now customize the colors of the pins on the map.
1360.c3: NEW: Dismiss Contact feature - You can now dismiss contacts you no longer wish to visit and receive notifications when it's time to return to them.
1360.c4: Added notes support to time reports - You can now add notes to your daily time entries to keep track of important details.
1360.c5: Improves visibility of Map on Contacts Details screen.
1360.c7: Added statistics sections to your Monthly and Yearly reports to better track your progress and patterns.
1360.c8: You can now change your calendar's first day of the week. Visit Preferences > Appearance.
1360.c9: Improved progress bar animations throughout the app and added additional encouragement messages.
1360.c10: Enhanced follow up topic input - Now supports multiple lines for easier writing of longer topics.
1360.c11: There are now no restrictions on when you can add or schedule time, in the future or past.
1360.c12: Added visual indicators on calendar days to show when notes are present.
1360.c13: Resolves issue with Korean and Panama phone number formatting.
1360.c14: Improves visibility of Map on Contacts Details screen with better zoom levels.
1360.c15: Fixed various navigation issues when adding time and scheduling plans.
1360.c16: Improved readability and consistency throughout the app with better spacing and button sizes.

1382.c1: The Milestone Update is here. Isura nshya yose hamwe na bar ya tab ireremba, amakarita akonje, hamwe nuburyo bushya, bugezweho muri porogaramu.
1382.c2: New Contacts tab with fuzzy search, smart sort, and stacked filters. Your contacts are now a first-class destination.
1382.c3: Progress Screen 2.0: isura nshya y'ukwezi, umwaka, n'ibihe byose, hamwe n'ibihe by'ingenzi bigezweho, gusenyuka kw'ibyiciro, n'amasaha y'ubuzima.
1382.c4: iCloud sync arrives (Supporter): your reports, contacts, and plans stay in step across all your devices. Optional photo sync keeps avatars synced too.
1382.c5: Onboarding has been rebuilt from the ground up. Ibaruramari ryihariye ryububiko bwibicuruzwa, igenamigambi ryihariye, hamwe nuburyo bwo kugenzura ibicuruzwa byawe.
1382.c6: Brand new home screen widgets: monthly calendar, appointments, hours, and contacts. All one tap away.
1382.c7: Contact avatars are here. Amafoto cyangwa emoji, hamwe na tap-to-kwagura fullscreen viewer.
1382.c8: Sangira contact n'undi mwanditsi ukoresheje secure universal links.
1382.c9: Smarter repeating plans. Schedule by day-of-week and week-of-month, with per-instance overrides and deletions.
1382.c10: Time rollover: Fractional minutes carry forward into next month, manually or automatically.
1382.c11: Beautiful new celebrations the moment you cross a goal.
1382.c12: New Supporter tier with personalization, including a custom accent color.
1382.c13: Schedule screen: a focused calendar view of day plans and repeating conversations.
1382.c14: Ikarita y'umwirondoro ivuguruye kuri ecran yo mu rugo yerekana uruhare rwawe, igihe cyakorewe, n'imibare ishimishije.
1382.c15: Ibiganiro byihariye n'ibyabuze ubu bigaragaramo kuri ecran yo mu rugo kugira ngo utazigera utakaza icyerekezo.
1382.c16: Telephone region code now persists across new contacts. Porogaramu yo kugenzura ibicuruzwa bya elegitoroniki byihuse kandi byihuse.
1382.c17: Map empty state, location prompts, and contact map clustering have all been polished.
1382.c18: Ibicuruzwa bito bitabarika, impinduka mu mikorere, no kunoza amashusho muri porogaramu.

helpCenter_intro_blurb: Shaka ibisubizo byihuse by'ibibazo abantu bakunze kwibaza ku birebana n'umurimo w'ubuhamya. Ntushobora kubona ibyo ukeneye? Reach out — your feedback shapes the app.

faq_emailLevi: Reach out privately by email at
faq_timeRollover_a: Yego. Igice cy'amasaha ari munsi y'intego yawe ya buri kwezi gishobora kwiyongera kugeza mu kwezi gutaha. Fungura Preferences → Publisher hanyuma uhindure amahitamo ya rollover. Amasaha yatwawe agaragara mu buryo bwikora iyo ukwezi gutangiye, bityo ntukeneye gukuramo intoki cyangwa kongera kwinjiza ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose.
faq_bibleStudies_q: Ni mu buhe buryo inyigisho za Bibiliya zibarwa?
faq_bibleStudies_a: Ubushakashatsi bukorwa buri munsi, ntabwo bukorwa buri munsi. To count a study, open a contact, log a conversation, and mark it as "Conducted Bible Study." That contact will count as 1 study for the current month, even if you have multiple sessions with them. Kugira ngo wongere umubare w'abashakashatsi, andika ikiganiro cyo kwiga hamwe n'undi muntu ukora.
faq_iCloudSync_q: Nshobora guhuza amakuru yanjye hagati ya iPhone na iPad?
faq_iCloudSync_a: Yego. iCloud Sync ituma igihe cyawe cyo kwinjira, contacts, n'ibiganiro bihuza ku bikoresho bya iOS mu buryo bwikora. Enable it under Settings → iCloud Sync. iCloud Sync is a Supporter-tier feature.
faq_widgets_q: Are there home or lock screen widgets?
faq_widgets_a: Yego, kuri iOS. Kanda igihe kirekire ku rugo rwawe cyangwa kuri ecran ifunze, kanda kuri buto +, shakisha WitnessWork, hanyuma uhitemo widget wifuza. Widget y'amasaha yerekana iterambere ryawe rya buri kwezi.
faq_switchingPioneer_q: Ni gute nahindura hagati y'umubwiriza n'umupayiniya w'umufasha hagati y'ukwezi?
faq_switchingPioneer_a: Fungura ahanditse ahanditse → Umwamamaji maze uhitemo ibikwiriye muri iki gihe: Umubwisi, Umupayiniya Umufasha, Umupayiniya Usaho, Umupayiniya Udasanzwe, Umugenzuzi w'Itorero cyangwa Umugenzuzi Mukuru w'Itorero. Goals and totals adjust to match. Subira inyuma igihe uzaba urangije. Past months keep the time you entered, so your history remains exact.
faq_submitReport_q: Does the app submit my service report for me?
faq_submitReport_a: Oya. TestWork itegura igihe cyawe n'ibiganiro byawe. Uburyo n'uwo utanga raporo yawe biterwa n'uko wowe na komite y'umurimo wawe bigerwaho. You can copy a plain-text summary, share via Hourglass, or open NW Publisher from the export sheet.
faq_remainingHours_q: Ni gute namenya umubare w'amasaha nsigaje muri uku kwezi cyangwa mu mwaka?
faq_remainingHours_a: Open the Progress tab from the bottom bar. Igishushanyo mbonera cy'ukwezi kigaragaza igihe n'amasaha asigaye muri uku kwezi. Abapayiniya barashobora kwimukira kuri sub-screen y'umwaka kugira ngo barebe iterambere ry'intego y'umwaka, igihe kugeza ubu, amasaha asigaye, hamwe n'isesengura rya buri kwezi ugereranije amasaha nyayo na teganyo.
faq_goalPacing_q: Ni gute namenya niba ndi imbere cyangwa inyuma y'intego yanjye y'isaha?
faq_goalPacing_a: Open the Progress tab from the bottom bar. Porogaramu ya USU ikwereka intego yawe ya buri munsi kugirango urebe niba uri mu nzira y'ukwezi. Pioneers can switch to the Year sub-screen to see monthly pace towards the annual goal at a glance.
faq_timeFormat_q: Nshobora kwerekana igihe nka "1h 30m" aho kuba "1.5"?
faq_timeFormat_a: Yego. Fungura Preferences → Appearance hanyuma uhitemo igihe ushaka. Aya mashusho yombi aboneka ahantu hose hagaragara.
faq_weekStart_q: Ese nshobora gutangira icyumweru ku wa mbere aho kuba ku cyumweru?
faq_weekStart_a: Yego. Ibyifuzo → isura bigufasha guhitamo umunsi wa mbere w'icyumweru. Iri tegeko rireba ingengabihe y'icyumweru, ingengabihe n'ibindi bikorwa byose by'icyumweru.
faq_darkMode_q: Ese nshobora gukoresha uburyo bw'umwijima cyangwa uburyo bw'urumuri?
faq_darkMode_a: Yego. Fungura Preferences → Appearance → Color Scheme hanyuma uhitemo System, Light, or Dark. Porogaramu ihagarika gukurikirana imiterere ya telefoni yawe hanyuma ukoreshe iyo uhitamo.
faq_appIcon_q: Ese nshobora guhindura indangamuntu ya porogaramu ya USU?
faq_appIcon_a: Yego. Fungura Preferences → App Icon hanyuma uhitemo mu zindi zihari. Alternate icons are a Supporter-tier perk.
faq_reorderHome_q: Nshobora kongera gutumiza amakarita kuri ecran yanjye yo mu rugo?
faq_reorderHome_a: Yego. Fungura Preferences → Home Screen kugirango wereke, guhisha, no kongera gutunganya amakarita. Home Amakuru Amakuru Mashya Rayon Sports izakomeza gukurikirana imiterere y'ikipe y'igihugu Amavubi.
faq_timerRounding_q: Why was my timer rounded to the nearest 5 minutes?
faq_timerRounding_a: Iyo yari imyitwarire ya kera. Version ziherutse kuzigama igihe nyacyo cyo guhagarara mugihe uhagaritse isaha, nta kuzunguruka. Niba ugifite iminota 5 yo kuzenguruka, vugurura porogaramu kuri verisiyo iheruka.
faq_addNotesToTime_q: Ese nshobora kongeramo inyandiko ku gihe cyo kwiyandikisha?
faq_addNotesToTime_a: Yego. Mu gihe wongeyeho cyangwa uhinduye inyandiko y'igihe, ushobora gushyiramo inyuguti (urugero: "Gutanga ubuhamya bw'ikarita" cyangwa "gukata ngufi"). You can also tag entries with categories so similar entries stay grouped in your time reports.
faq_specialPioneerAnnual_q: Ndi umupayiniya udasanzwe, kuki porogaramu inyereka intego y'umwaka?
faq_specialPioneerAnnual_a: Abapayiniya badasanzwe ntibagira intego y'umwaka. If yours appears, open Preferences → Publisher and turn off the annual goal. Your monthly goal remains in place and the annual bar on the Progress tab's Year sub-screen will be hidden.
faq_ldcCreditCap_q: Are LDC and other credit hours included in my totals?
faq_ldcCreditCap_a: Yego. Amasaha y'inguzanyo abarwa ku isaha yawe ya buri kwezi. Mu mwaka w'umurimo, amasaha 55 y'inguzanyo buri kwezi arabarwa, hakurikijwe ibipimo byatangajwe n'ishami. Buri kintu cyose kiri hejuru y'igipimo kiracyashyirwa ku rutonde rw'ibicuruzwa, ariko ntikijya mu gipimo cy'umwaka.
faq_timezoneShift_q: Will my time entries or plans shift days if I travel between timezones?
faq_timezoneShift_a: Oya. Kuva mu ivugurura rya Mata 2026, igihe cyose kwinjira na gahunda bihujwe n'itariki ya kalendari yigenga, bityo kugenda cyangwa kwambuka umupaka w'izuba ntibizamura kwinjiza ku wundi munsi. Older entries created before that update are migrated automatically the first time you open the new version. Niba ubonye inyandiko ku munsi utari wo nyuma yo kuvugurura, nyamuneka wohereze raporo ya bug hanyuma tuzareba.
faq_editRecurringPlan_q: Ese nshobora gukuraho cyangwa gukuraho inyandiko imwe y'ikinyamakuru Izuba Rirashe?
faq_editRecurringPlan_a: Yego. Fungura ahanditse Gahunda y'itariki wifuza guhindura, hanyuma uhitemo ahanditse "Edit" cyangwa "Delete" kugira ngo uhindure. Gahunda yawe ihoraho ihoraho buri munsi.
faq_awayDay_q: How do I mark a day I'm not going out without breaking my repeat plan?
faq_awayDay_a: Kanda ku munsi kuri tab ya Schedule hanyuma wongereho override ya "kure" cyangwa ubusa. Iki gitekerezo kigira ingaruka ku munsi umwe gusa, kandi gahunda isubiramo ikomeza guhera ku munsi ukurikiyeho.
faq_importContacts_q: Ese nshobora kwinjiza contacts muri book ya aderesi ya telefoni yanjye?
faq_importContacts_a: Si muri iki gihe. Contacts are entered manually in WitnessWork. This keeps your ministry contacts private and avoids accidentally pulling in personal contacts.
faq_importOtherApps_q: Nshobora kwinjiza amakuru kuri MyTime, Ministry Assistant, cyangwa indi porogaramu?
faq_importOtherApps_a: Not out of the box. Izindi porogaramu nyinshi zibika amakuru muburyo bwite cyangwa bwihariye, kandi ntituzisubiramo. Inzira yoroshye kuri buri wese ni ukongera gukora intoki contacts zawe zikora muri WitnessWork, hanyuma usubire inyuma buri gihe. Niba uri umucuruzi w'inararibonye kandi ukaba wifuza gutunganya umuyoboro wawe bwite, genda. Ibicuruzwa bya WitnessWork ni JSON isanzwe ifite imiterere idasanzwe, isomwa n'abantu, kandi isoko ifunguye kuri github.com/leviFrosty/witness-work. See src/types (contact.ts, conversation.ts, serviceReport.ts, etc.) for the canonical types you'd need to match on both ends. Gusa menya ko iyi atari inzira ishyigikiwe n'amategeko: ntabwo tuzafasha debug importer yawe, kandi ubwoko bushobora guhinduka.
faq_backupRestore_q: Ni gute nabika no kubika amakuru yanjye?
faq_backupRestore_a: Fungura Preferences → Backups kugirango wohereze dosiye ya backup. Kubika kuri iCloud Drive, Files, cyangwa ahandi hose, hanyuma ku gikoresho gishya kanda kuri "Import" hanyuma uhitemo dosiye. Niba kugarura bisa n'aho bidasobanutse, nyamuneka twandikire kuri email ya Levi mu ibanga hamwe na dosiye ya backup yashyizweho kandi tuzagufasha. Koresha link ya email iri hepfo y'iyi skrini.
faq_shareAddress_q: Ni gute nabona amabwiriza yo kubonana n'umuntu runaka?
faq_shareAddress_a: Fungura aderesi hanyuma ukande kuri aderesi yawe. Uzahabwa Apple Maps, Google Maps, cyangwa Waze bitewe n'ibyo washyizweho. Urashobora kandi guhitamo aho uherereye udafite aderesi, ibi bikaba ari ingirakamaro kuturere tudafite nimero z'imihanda.
faq_manualPin_q: Igitambaro cyanjye kiri ahantu habi. Ese nshobora kuyihindura?
faq_manualPin_a: Yego. Fungura aderesi ya contact hanyuma ushyiremo pin ahantu hakwiye. Urashobora kandi gushiraho pin udafite aderesi na gato, ibi bifasha ahantu hatagira amakuru yihariye ya geolocation.
faq_profilePic_q: Ese nshobora kongeramo ifoto y'umuntu ku giti cyanjye?
faq_profilePic_a: Yego. Fungura contact, kanda kuri avatar, hanyuma utore ifoto mu isomero ryawe cyangwa ufate indi nshya. Ibi bifasha cyane cyane mu gihe abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga basangiye amazina cyangwa iyo ifoto igufasha kumenya urugi rwiza.
faq_dismissContact_a: Fungura contact hanyuma ukande kuri "Dismiss". Uzahitamo igihe cyo kwirukana (icyumweru 1, ukwezi 1, amezi 3, amezi 6, cyangwa umwaka 1). The contact disappears from your active lists for that period and then comes back automatically when the time is over. Niba imenyesha ryemewe, uzabona kandi urwibutso igihe bongeye kugaragara, bityo abakoresha bahagaritswe ntibazatemba bucece. Urashobora kubona cyangwa kugarura contacts zaciwe igihe icyo ari cyo cyose ukoresheje Settings → Discharged Contacts.
faq_reportBug_q: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
faq_reportBug_a: Kanda kuri imwe muri buto hepfo kugirango ufungure raporo ya bug cyangwa ubusabe bw'ibintu mu buryo butaziguye. Raporo zikubiyemo screenshot, igikoresho cyawe + verisiyo ya iOS, na verisiyo ya WitnessWork (igaragara hepfo ya Settings) biroroshye gukosora byihuse.
faq_becomeSupporter_q: What does becoming a Supporter unlock?
faq_becomeSupporter_a: Ubuhamya bw'Imana ni ubuntu kandi buzahoraho. Niba porogaramu yagufashije, kuba umuterankunga ni uburyo bwo gushimira no kugufasha gukomeza gutera imbere. Abakunzi b'umupira w'amaguru na bo bahabwa amahirwe yo gushimira abakunzi b'umupira w'amaguru. Kanda kuri Become a Supporter from the Settings drawer for the current details.
faq_stillFree_a: Yes — and will always be. Buri kintu cy'ingenzi kiba ku buntu kuri buri wese. Supporting is completely optional; Ifasha mu gutera inkunga iterambere rikomeza kandi igafungura ibintu bike by'umuntu ku giti cye nk'ishimwe ryo gushimira.
faq_stopSupporting_q: Bigenda bite mu gihe nahagaritse gushyigikirwa?
faq_stopSupporting_a: Nta kintu na kimwe kijyanye n'amakuru yawe gihinduka. If a monthly subscription lapses, any supporter-only personalization gracefully reverts to its defaults — your reports, contacts, notes, and settings are kept exactly as they are.
faq_acceptDonations_a: Kubera ko ndi umuvandimwe wo mu Ngoro, mbona ari iby'agaciro gukoresha ubuhanga bwanjye mu gufasha abandi bo mu itorero. N'ubwo bimeze gutyo ariko, buri wese akoresha uburyo bwo kugenzura no kubungabunga ibidukikije, bitwara amafaranga menshi n'igihe. Njye mbona gutanga ari kimwe n'uburyo umuntu ashobora kwishyura gaz y'undi nyuma yo kujya mu murimo - ni igikorwa cy'urukundo gishimwa cyane.
faq_donationsUsedFor_a: Your donation helps keep this app running! There are costs with buying real devices as development equipment, paying for location API service fees, build service API fees, app store fees, and opportunity cost of my many hours spent developing this app. Buri gice cy'ubufasha kirashimwa cyane!
faq_whatsNew_q: Where can I see what changed in the latest update?
faq_whatsNew_a: Settings → What's New shows a summary of recent changes. Major updates also pop up a one-time "What's New" sheet the first time you open the app after updating.

availability.settingsRowDescription: Bwira uwo mufasha iminsi yawe y'ikiruhuko n'iminsi y'amateraniro yo mu Nzu y'Ubwami. Ni yo mpamvu ikoresha impande zombi mu gutegura amahugurwa yayo.

onboarding.title: Ni iyihe minsi yawe y'ikiruhuko?
onboarding.body: Tap the days the Assistant should skip completely. Ntabwo tuzatanga serivisi muri iyi minsi. Urashobora guhindura ibi igihe icyo aricyo cyose.
onboarding.meetingDaysTitle: Iminsi y'amateraniro yo mu Nzu y'Ubwami
onboarding.meetingDaysBody: Koresha iminsi mugirana amateraniro. Ni byiza ko iyo minsi iba yoroheje kugira ngo ubone umwanya wo kwitegura no kwitegura.

intro.title: Gira gahunda ijyanye n'imiterere y'umubiri
intro.body: Bwira umufasha iminsi yawe y'ikiruhuko n'iminsi y'amakoraniro, kandi azatanga gahunda ikomeye yo kugera ku ntego yawe.
